summary: Mobile API Optimization testing completed successfully. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend mobile features verified: Settings page with cache/refresh/sound/compact controls, Mobile Bottom Nav with 4 items (Dashboard, Leaderboard, Alerts, Settings), responsive breakpoint behavior (hidden at md/768px+, visible below). No regressions found on admin/traffic and leaderboard pages.

integration_issues.issue: Toast notifications can intercept bottom nav clicks due to z-index overlap. Toasts appear at bottom-right and can block nav items temporarily.
integration_issues.note: This is a minor UX issue - toasts auto-dismiss after 6 seconds

passed_tests: GET /api/mobile/bootstrap?demo=true returns 200
Bootstrap demo has user object with id=demo-user, name=Demo Trader, email=demo@alphaai.com
Bootstrap demo has user.user_tier=pro and is_pro=true
Bootstrap demo has followed_strategies array with 3 strategies
Bootstrap demo has unread_alerts=3
Bootstrap demo has feature_flags (demo_mode, mobile_optimized, real_time_alerts, strategy_lab)
Bootstrap demo has strategies_summary with total=12 and top_performer
Bootstrap demo has timestamp field
GET /api/mobile/bootstrap without auth returns 401
GET /api/mobile/bootstrap with invalid token returns 401
GET /api/mobile/bootstrap with valid Bearer token returns 200
Bootstrap auth returns correct user email
POST /api/mobile/refresh without body returns 400
POST /api/mobile/refresh without refresh_token returns 400
POST /api/mobile/refresh with invalid token returns 401
POST /api/mobile/refresh with valid refresh_token returns new access_token and user_tier
Frontend /settings?demo=true renders Settings page with title
Frontend /settings?demo=true shows Clear Cache button (clickable)
Frontend /settings?demo=true shows Refresh Data button (clickable, fetches bootstrap)
Frontend /settings?demo=true shows Alert Sounds toggle (On/Off)
Frontend /settings?demo=true shows Compact Mode toggle (On/Off)
Frontend /settings?demo=true shows Cache Status section with 4 keys (bootstrap, strategies, followed, alerts)
Frontend mobile bottom nav visible at 390px viewport width
Frontend mobile bottom nav has 4 items: Dashboard, Leaderboard, Alerts, Settings
Frontend mobile bottom nav hidden at 768px (md breakpoint)
Frontend mobile bottom nav visible at 767px (below md)
Frontend /alerts?demo=true loads with Live badge (connection status)
Frontend /dashboard?demo=true loads at mobile width without horizontal overflow
No regressions: /admin/traffic?demo=true renders all sections (Traffic Analytics, Active Alerts, KPIs, Charts, Funnel, Health, Strategy Activity, Live Event Stream)
No regressions: /leaderboard?demo=true loads strategy list with 8 strategies
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo mode data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile optimization features fully functional. Bootstrap endpoint returns demo data at /api/mobile/bootstrap?demo=true or authenticated user data with Bearer token. Refresh endpoint at /api/mobile/refresh accepts refresh_token and returns new access_token. Frontend has MobileSettingsPage at /settings with cache management and preference toggles. MobileBottomNav is visible only below md breakpoint (768px) with 4 nav items. MobileNetworkBanner shows offline/reconnecting status. WebSocket reconnection enhanced with visibilitychange and online event handlers.

GET /api/mobile/bootstrap.demo_mode: Returns static demo data with user, followed_strategies, unread_alerts, feature_flags, strategies_summary
GET /api/mobile/bootstrap.authenticated: Returns real user data from database

MobileBottomNav.navigation: All items navigate to correct pages

MobileNetworkBanner.reconnecting_banner: Shows when online but WS disconnected

mobile_cache.cacheGet: Retrieves cached data with TTL check

mobile_api.flushOfflineQueue: Sends queued events when back online
